basic_details.organization_name: CSIR National Environmental Engineering Research Institute
basic_details.short_information: CSIR National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR-NEERI) Project Associate (PAT-II) Notification 2026 has been released on 25 June 2026 on the official website neeri.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR-NEERI Project Associate (PAT-II) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

qualification.details: M.Sc. (Microbiology/ Biotechnology/ Biochemistry/ Life Sciences) from a recognized University or equivalent AND 2 years experience in microbiology/molecular biology, bioinformatics analysis and/or health risk assessment.

salary_details.details: Rs. 35,000/- + HRA or Rs. 28,000/- + HRA Per Month

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CSIR-NEERI Project Associate (PAT-II) Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download CSIR-NEERI Project Associate (PAT-II) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR-NEERI Project Associate (PAT-II) recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 09 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate (PAT-II) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Microbiology, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, or Life Sciences, along with 2 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate (PAT-II) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 28,000 to Rs. 35,000 per month, plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this CSIR-NEERI job?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the CSIR-NEERI located for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the CSIR-NEERI office in Nagpur, Maharashtra, with the pincode 440020.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Project Associate (PAT-II) post?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual job as a Project Associate (PAT-II).
